debug_info.goal:
ob : ProbComp Bool

      pure !decide (b = b')] =
    Pr[=true | do
      let b ← OracleComp.uniformSample Bool OracleComp.instSampleableTypeBool
      let b' ← ob
      pure (decide (b = b'))]
